scenarios.name: logPartial legacy routes income to default account
logPartial clamps above remaining and settles
logPartial cashLeg routes a transfer back into the account
markPaid settles the remainder with a settled-tagged payment
markPaid with nothing left just closes
markPaid cashLeg returns cash as a transfer
removePayment reverses the txn and reopens
removePayment without txnId only drops the row
save creates utang and person, legacy
save matches existing person case-insensitively and updates phone
save with fromAccount records the lending cash leg
save refuses editing the total below what is paid
save paid toggle on posts the settling income
save reopen reverses only settled-tagged payments
delete reverses payments and the lend leg
